description: Proficiency at the intermediate level in listening, speaking, reading and writing, using communicative approaches. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 121(or LCA LANG 301 prior to Fall 2019)

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 121(or LCA LANG 301 prior to Fall 2019)
